description: Weekly competitive intelligence scan. Tracks competitor ad strategies, spots messaging shifts and new bets, diffs against last week's baseline, and posts a delta report to Slack automatically every Monday.

customize.description: The Motion workspace ID for this sandbox. Found in workspace settings or resolved via motion workspace-goal.
Human-readable workspace or brand name. Used to namespace brain files and derive the workspace slug.
URL-safe version of the workspace name — lowercase, hyphens for spaces. Derived at install time from WORKSPACE_NAME. Used as the folder name under /agent/brain/competition/.

installs.purpose: Empty inspoBrands seed. Populated by setup-competitor-intel on first run.
Creates the baselines directory. Baseline files are written here by each scan run.
Core competitor watch skill. Runs on schedule and on explicit trigger.
Setup and reconfiguration skill. Runs on first install; re-invokable any time.

post_install.name: Configure your competitor inspo brands
post_install.description: Walks through selecting competitors, resolving them in Motion's ad library, configuring Slack delivery, and scheduling the weekly routine.

post_install.name: Introduce the new capability
post_install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Path migration. Brain data write path moves from /agent/brain/competitor-intel/<workspace-slug>/ to /agent/brain/competition/<workspace-slug>/ so competitor watch output sits inside the Competition brain domain instead of a sibling root. Aligns with brain-onboard's ten-domain layout. The skill install path stays at /agent/.agents/skills/competitor-intel/ — only the brain data path moves. Includes migration-helper.sh that detects /agent/brain/competitor-intel/ on existing installs, moves contents to /agent/brain/competition/ preserving accumulated weekly snapshots and baselines, and leaves a 30-day stub at the old path. No behavior changes to the weekly run itself.
Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

Initial release. Translated from motion-creative-plugin competitor-intel MCP skill. Competitor brands tracked in workspace-scoped inspoBrands.json seed. MCP tools replaced with native motion CLI. Two-pass active portfolio pull, survival cohort analysis, weekly delta computation. Setup skill handles brand resolution, own-brand ID storage, Slack channel config, and reminder scheduling.
